Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can now speak to Elizabeth about accepting and reporting requests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Requests can involve anything from hunting for items to fusing specific Personas. When you complete a request, you will be rewarded.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You might see an influx of requests during specific times of the year. Additionally, there are requests that only become available after completing certain previous requests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Some requests have deadlines. If you miss the deadline, the request will {f 0 1 2}expire{f 0 1 27}, and you will no longer be able to complete it.[n]{f 1 1}
